gaps: v0.1 emits cookie-aware request shapes but does not yet attach cookies on the wire; real-network calls require manual cookie paste
wait endpoint emits an object body; the upstream expects a single-element JSON array (1-line patch in internal/client.go)
transcendence commands (watch, drift, plan, compare, next-open, recommend, history) are scoped for v0.2; v0.1 ships every endpoint shape and the data-layer scaffold
patterns: two-host single-auth client (webservices.greatclips.com + www.stylewaretouch.net both authenticated by one Auth0 session)
vendor-brand wraps third-party operations (ICS Net Check-In powers the wait/check-in surface)
local timeseries unlocks 'vs typical' / drift commands that the upstream API cannot answer
HttpOnly cookie auth from a logged-in Chrome session, scoped per host

novel_features.name: Live wait time at any salon
novel_features.description: Fetch real-time estimated wait minutes for a specific salon, signed with the ICS Net Check-In HMAC.
novel_features.rationale: Stylewaretouch.net rejects unsigned requests with HTTP 500 NPE; this CLI ports the SPA HMAC-SHA-256 signing scheme (verified byte-identical via golden vector test) so wait queries work outside the browser.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Lets an agent check whether to leave the house for a haircut without parking a human at the SPA.

novel_features.name: Party check-in via CLI
novel_features.description: Add yourself plus up to 4 additional party members to a salon waitlist with one command.
novel_features.rationale: The SPA submit flow requires HMAC signing plus a customer-audience HS512 JWT plus a non-obvious request body shape; this CLI ships the full pipeline.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Turns the click-through into one keystroke, agent-actionable.

novel_features.name: Active check-in status lookup
novel_features.description: Query the live position-in-line and estimated wait for the current accounts active check-in.
novel_features.rationale: Server-side state lookup using the HMAC + customer-aud Bearer pipeline.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Watch the queue without refreshing a browser tab.

novel_features.name: Cancel active check-in
novel_features.description: Remove yourself from the salon waitlist without opening the SPA.
novel_features.rationale: Closes the lifecycle. Body shape and signing are non-trivial to reproduce; the CLI ships them.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Plans change. The CLI handles the undo path too.

novel_features.name: Customer profile lookup
novel_features.description: Fetch the authenticated customer profile (name, email, phone, favorite salons) via the Auth0 customer-audience token.
novel_features.rationale: Verifies the Auth0 silent-mint pipeline end-to-end and yields the profileId checkin needs.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Confirms auth is working and gives the profileId checkin needs.

narrative.headline: First CLI for Great Clips Online Check-In: every endpoint shape and host route, ready for real calls once cookies are wired.
narrative.value_prop: Drives the Great Clips Online Check-In API (webservices.greatclips.com) and the ICS Net Check-In wait/check-in service (www.stylewaretouch.net) from one Go binary. v0.1 ships every endpoint with --dry-run and --json so an agent can build flows on top; live calls require pasting cookies from a logged-in Chrome session (documented v0.2 gap).
narrative.auth_narrative: Great Clips uses HttpOnly session cookies from an Auth0 tenant at cid.greatclips.com. Browser-sniff confirmed all calls succeed via cookies attached by the browser, not via an Authorization header. v0.1 of this CLI ships the request shape and host routing; to make real calls, paste the cookies from a logged-in Chrome session into ~/.config/greatclips-pp-cli/config.toml. Set GREATCLIPS_TOKEN to any placeholder so doctor passes (the env var is kept for v0.2 when bearer support might land).

quickstart.comment: Verifies config and base URL reachability (set GREATCLIPS_TOKEN=placeholder first so the env-var check passes; real auth is cookie-based and documented in README)
Wait-time request for one salon (Island Square on Mercer Island)
Party-of-four check-in request body; remove --dry-run when cookies are configured

troubleshoots.fix: Set GREATCLIPS_TOKEN to any non-empty value (the upstream uses cookies, not a Bearer; v0.1 keeps the env var so doctor passes).

troubleshoots.symptom: checkin returns 401 or 403 against the real API
troubleshoots.fix: v0.1 does not yet attach Chrome cookies. Open https://app.greatclips.com, log in, copy the auth0 session cookies for both webservices.greatclips.com and www.stylewaretouch.net, paste into ~/.config/greatclips-pp-cli/config.toml under cookie keys (cookie auth integration is a v0.2 gap).

troubleshoots.symptom: wait returns object body but the API wants an array
troubleshoots.fix: The waitTime endpoint expects a JSON array of {storeNumber}. v0.1 emits the object form; patch internal/client.go to wrap the body in [] or use --stdin and pipe the array shape.

narrative.when_to_use: Use this CLI to send the exact HTTP requests the Great Clips Online Check-In SPA sends, from the command line, with dry-run and --json output. v0.1 ships every endpoint's request shape so an agent can build flows on top; real calls require manual cookie capture from a logged-in Chrome session.

recipes.title: Party-of-four check-in request body
recipes.explanation: Emits the exact JSON body POSTed to www.stylewaretouch.net/api/customer/checkIn for a party of four at Island Square.

recipes.title: Wait-time request for a salon
recipes.explanation: Request shape for the ICS Net Check-In waitTime endpoint.

recipes.title: Salons near a zip
recipes.explanation: Request shape for the salon-search/term endpoint with a 5-mile radius.

recipes.title: 14-day hours forecast
recipes.explanation: Calls salon-hours/upcoming for one salon; the response includes special-hours and holiday closures.

recipes.title: Geocode a postal code
recipes.explanation: Resolves a zip code to lat/lng/city/state via the geo-names endpoint.

trigger_phrases: how long is the wait at great clips
add me and my kids to the great clips wait list
